LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Heart.label: Hunter Hive Ship-Heart
LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Heart.description: The heart of an Arachne Swarm Hunter Hive Ship, functioning similarly to a human's reverse gravity engine.
LanguageData.ARA_PilotConsole.label: Hunter Hive Ship-Linker
LanguageData.ARA_PilotConsole.description: The Linker is the platform used by Hive Arachne to communicate with Hive Hunter ships.
LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Stomach.label: Hunter Hive Ship - Stomach
LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Stomach.description: The stomach sac of the Arachne Swarm Hunter hive ship, which stores biomass for the hive ship to move around.
LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Tail.label: Hunter Hive Ship - Tentacles
LanguageData.ARA_HiveShip_Tail.description: The organs used by the Hunter Hive Ship for movement.
